/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libolei_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so -o libolei_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so CMakeFiles/olei_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/olei_interfaces/msg/detail/vf_header__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/olei_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/olei_interfaces/msg/detail/v2_header__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/foxy/lib: /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so
